content.query:
DROP TABLE [EDW].[DIM_TIME_SLOTS]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[DIM_TIME_SLOTS]
( 
	[TimeSlotID] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,
	[SlotTime] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[SlotTimeAP] [nvarchar](7)  NULL,
	[ShortName] [nvarchar](5)  NULL,
	[MediumName] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,
	[LongName] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Active] [bit]  NULL,
	[LP_TimeSlotID] [int]  NULL,
	[Division] [nvarchar](10)  NULL,
	[LastUpdateTS] [datetime2](7)  NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = REPLICATE
)
GO
